title: PlayerProgress
description: PlayerProgress is a Minecraft datapack that introduces a leveling system. Earn UP from activities like mining and combat to level up and gain new abilities and rewards.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/playerprogress?logo=modrinth&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerprogress) [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/playerprogress?logo=modrinth&label=&style=flat&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerprogress)

## **PlayerProgress**

**PlayerProgress** is a small datapack that gives you automatic upgrades when you complete certain tasks in Minecraft.
You play normally, but some commands like `/trigger tasksgui` are available to check your progress.

When you do things like mine diamonds, use a totem, or shoot a bow, your stats (like health, armor, or speed) go up using Minecraft’s built-in `/attribute` system.

Perfect for survival worlds or servers that want lightweight progression.

---

### 🧾 **Current Tasks & Rewards**

| **Task**               | **Reward**         |
| ---------------------- | ------------------ |
| Get 500 XP (points)    | +1 Heart           |
| Craft an Iron Sword    | +1 Attack Damage   |
| Die 10 Times           | +2 Max Health      |
| Shoot 30 Arrows        | +1 Attack Speed    |
| Mine 10 Diamonds       | +4 Armor           |
| Use a Totem of Undying | +5% Movement Speed |

Each reward is given only once per task.

---

### 🔧 **How to Use**

#### ✅ Manual Install:

1. Put the `.zip` file into your world’s `datapacks/` folder.
2. Open the world.
3. Play — upgrades unlock automatically when tasks are completed!

#### ✅ Using the Modrinth App:

1. Install the world you want to play on (or create a new one).
2. Open the **Modrinth App**.
3. Search for **PlayerProgress**, click **Install**, and select the world.
4. Launch Minecraft and enjoy auto-upgrades!

---

### ⚠️ **Versions**

All older versions are buggy — please use only release versions.
